data.name: 催眠！骚货女上司
data.detailed_description:
故事:
我們的主人公是一位日常白領，每天全力完成他的麻煩活，但他還要應付他的潑辣老板娘Erika。他唯一可以逃避這個世界的辦法就是躲到一群移動程序裡。某天，Erika又一次訓斥他的工作能力。他再一次躲避到他無數的程序裡，這次找到一個催眠程序，這真能用嗎？！
他問Erika 為什麼這麼折磨他？原來Erika 隻因不喜歡他的熊樣，所以總是欺負他。他終於受夠啦，決定用他的催眠程序將Erika 變成他的個人淫婦來報仇！

特點:
  • 從原裝日本VN本地化。
  • Erika帶有日文語音。
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 多小時的內容。
  • 帶有音樂和音效。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。
  • 15個成人情節，一個比一個更瘋狂！！

Bitchy Boss' Bimbofication是一個英文本地化的VN，由著名日本制作室 Norn/Miel所創作。 我們在櫻桃吻吻試圖將日本游戲帶到全世界。

**注意**
所有角色的描述和圖片都屬成人並沒有任何未成年人物用於這游戲裡。

data.short_description: 如果九到五不夠煩，每天對著潑婦經理就肯定夠啦。我們的主人公將鼓起勇氣用手機程序催眠他的性感潑娘！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體

data.name: Bitchy Boss Bimbofication
data.detailed_description:
Our protagonist is a typical office worker who is trying his best to power through his boring job despite his bitchy boss' best efforts to seemingly make each day more excruciating than the last. The only thing he can do to escape this painful routine is spend his money on shady apps he finds on the internet! On a day much like any other, his boss Erika is giving him a lecture about his poor performance. Our protagonist finally tries out his latest purchase, a Hypnosis app, and to his surprise it actually works!

He starts innocently enough, asking Erika why she picks on him so much. After hearing her honest answer, that she just hates him for being an unattractive loser who is a total eye-sore, you bet its time to put this hypnosis app to use by throwing her common sense out the window and warping her mind into the perfect cock-hungry slut to make up for all the misery she caused!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Erika is fully voiced with their original Japanese dialogue.
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants.
  • Hours of story content.
  • Audio including music and special effects.
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations.
  • Gallery and Scene selections.
  • 15 twisted sex scenes each more depraved than the last as Erika falls deeper under your control!

Bitchy Boss' Bimbofication is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Norn/Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: If working the 9-to-5 grind wasn't soul crushing enough, having a bitchy boss constantly yelling at you sure is! That all changes for our protagonist, who works up the courage to test out a sketchy Hypnosis app on who else, but his sexy boss!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
